description: Automation opportunity map (rule #5). Ranked by payoff. `impact` = business value, `complexity` = build difficulty, `quadrant` = quick-win | strategic | fill-in | hard-slog. `business_impact` estimates the value; `product` = the NIRVA product that delivers it.

opportunities.name: Integrity check-in verification
opportunities.description: Geo+liveness+device verification replacing LINE check-in; auto-reconcile billable headcount.
opportunities.business_impact: Eliminates ghost/buddy-punch leakage (est. 1-8% of payroll) + protects SLA billing.

opportunities.name: Payroll auto-calc + statutory filing prep
opportunities.description: Compute OT/SSO/WHT from verified hours; generate PND.1 & SSO files; lock records.
opportunities.business_impact: Cuts payroll cycle time & error/penalty risk; enforces SoD.

opportunities.name: LINE/email complaint auto-capture
opportunities.description: Ingest complaints from LINE/email into a tracked queue with SLA timers and categorization.
opportunities.business_impact: Stops complaints getting lost; protects renewals.

opportunities.name: WHT/VAT auto-calc + e-tax invoice
opportunities.description: Apply WHT/VAT on transactions, validate tax-invoice fields, prep PND.3/53 & PP.30.

opportunities.name: Three-way match + fraud flags
opportunities.description: Auto-match PO/receipt/invoice; flag PO-splitting and vendor=employee bank.
opportunities.business_impact: Cuts procurement leakage (est. 5-15% of spend); anti-bribery evidence.

opportunities.name: Continuous control monitoring + evidence harvest
opportunities.description: Auto-collect evidence (EV-*) and recompute control status across standards continuously.
opportunities.business_impact: Always-audit-ready; one evidence base, many standards.

opportunities.name: No-show standby auto-dispatch
opportunities.description: On detected gap, notify and dispatch the standby pool automatically.
opportunities.business_impact: Reduces SLA penalties from understaffed sites.

opportunities.name: Consent + RoPA + DSAR timers
opportunities.description: Auto consent capture, RoPA prompts on new sources, DSAR/breach SLA timers.

opportunities.name: Bank reconciliation auto-match
opportunities.description: Match bank lines to ledger entries; flag unmatched for review.

opportunities.name: NOVA drafting with governed review
opportunities.description: Agents draft policies/reports/analysis; human-in-the-loop review for consequential output.
opportunities.business_impact: Massive ops leverage at low headcount; governed & auditable.

opportunities.name: Bring-Your-Mess data migration
opportunities.description: Drag-drop Excel/PDF/LINE/CSV; AI maps, validates, cleanses, imports with audit trail.
opportunities.business_impact: Collapses onboarding from months to hours — removes #1 adoption blocker.

opportunities.name: Executive early-warning analytics
opportunities.description: Leading indicators (attrition, complaint trend, SLA gap, OT spike) → AI daily briefing.
opportunities.business_impact: See problems before they become disasters.

sequencing: Quick-wins first (LINE complaint capture, standby dispatch, Bring-Your-Mess migration) to build trust & cash; strategic items (verification, payroll, P2P, continuous compliance, NOVA) are the durable value.
